name: testResetFilter
description: 'Reset' button clears selected filter values and resets them to default.
descriptionHtml: 'Reset' button clears selected filter values and resets them to default.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: 'Reset' button clears selected filter values and resets them to default.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: the selected acquirer filter is cleared
Verify: the status filter is reset to 'All'
